_meta.title: Apple Global Logistics Strategic Expansion
_meta.description: Tier 1 strategic account already using Freight Forwarding services across Asia, Middle East, and Europe. Strong operational engagement, active multi-threaded pipeline, and digital interest create a high-potential expansion scenario across Contract Logistics and Digital Supply Chain tools.

planIntent: How can we expand our existing Freight Forwarding relationship into Contract Logistics and Digital Supply Chain tools for this account?
